title: can / could / be able to
examples: It's like saying you can read the room well.
But you can say I'm cheering for you.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: I think the closest thing to 눈치 would be like reading the room.
If you say 눈치 없어, I think like naturally we would more so say someone is socially awkward.
I think the closest thing to 애교 in English would be like trying to be cute.
I recently heard that maybe like comorottery would be the closest thing we're on the same team.
For example, if I went to the restaurant in the ladies giving me extra food I would say, oh my god, she's so kind or she's so nice.
